extraction.one_line_summary: CHAVES attacked repeatedly in final 3km on climb, finally dropped LOPEZ and BIDARD with 2.5km to go, soloed to victory while LÓPEZ attacked behind to claw back time.
tactical_patterns: CHAVES repeated accelerations (5+ attacks) depleted group before decisive move at 2.5km, overwhelming rivals' recovery capacity rather than single explosive attack.
LÓPEZ attacked in pink jersey group after losing contact with CHAVES, gaining ~1min on CARAPAZ group when numerical superiority prevented coverage.
ROGLIČ attempted late attacks suited to his punchy finish capability, but CARAPAZ wheel-covered instantly showing INEOS protective vigilance before TT.

rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: positive: multiple explosive accelerations before decisive move reveals elite recovery between efforts, not just single-attack capacity
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: attacked behind race-winning move to gain substantial time, showing aggressive mindset despite lower GC position
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: covered every ROGLIČ late attack despite pink jersey defensive posture, maintaining control into decisive TT stage
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: attempted multiple late accelerations on finish-suited terrain but couldn't split group, signaling limited climbing superiority over CARAPAZ
rider_signals.BIDARD François: negative: held CHAVES initially but cracked when attacks repeated, demonstrating threshold durability gap versus explosive recovery capacity
